logic_gaps.description: Resource Map Coverage Gate behavior (documented in SKILL.md §3 lines 265-277, loop_protocol.md step 3b lines 315-328, state_format.md lines 118 + 745-772) has zero coverage in feature_catalog/ — grep returns 0 matches for 'Resource Map Coverage'

Semantic convergence signals semanticNovelty (lines 260-280) and findingStability (lines 282-307) plus legal-stop gate integration (310-319) documented in convergence.md but zero coverage in feature_catalog/
Security-Sensitive Fix Overrides section in convergence.md lines 66-76 (minStabilizationPasses, requiredClosedFindingReplay, requiredFixCompletenessGate) has zero coverage in feature_catalog/

Executor selection contract (parseExecutorConfig + per-kind dispatch branches for native/cli-codex/cli-gemini/cli-claude-code + flag compatibility enforcement) documented in loop_protocol.md lines 268-284 has zero coverage in feature_catalog/

Extended quality gates (evidenceDensityGate, hotspotSaturationGate, graphBlockerDetail, fixCompletenessReplayGate) only mentioned in passing at feature_catalog/04--severity-system/05-quality-gates.md line 16; full contracts in state_format.md lines 328-329 + convergence.md lines 113-130 not surfaced

graph_convergence event (state_format.md lines 342-369 including STOP_ALLOWED/STOP_BLOCKED/CONTINUE decision enum) only mentioned in passing in feature_catalog/02--state-management/01-jsonl-state-log.md line 18 as one of several event types; no dedicated feature entry

Pause sentinel mechanism (.deep-review-pause file, userPaused stop reason, pause/resume flow) only mentioned in passing in feature_catalog/01--loop-lifecycle/03-convergence-check.md line 12 as 'pause handling'; full contract in loop_protocol.md lines 202-219, state_format.md lines 23/34/90, convergence.md line 88 has no dedicated entry

novel_findings: All 21 existing feature_catalog entries map cleanly to runtime docs (zero Direction-B drift). Asymmetry: catalog under-covers runtime, never over-covers.

Pattern: catalog entries are 'first 21 features ever shipped'; new behaviors added in later releases (resource-map gate, semantic convergence, security overrides) did not get catalog updates. Suggests a process gap where catalog updates are not part of feature-release workflow.

Quality-gate documentation in catalog (04--severity-system/05-quality-gates.md) is the most under-described entry relative to the gate model that actually exists in code/docs — it stops at 'evidence density, hotspot saturation' without naming the gate identifiers.
notes: Iter 2 RQ: feature_catalog vs runtime-docs drift. SWE-1.6 + RCAF + sequential_thinking enforced. Wall-clock 88s. All 7 gaps novel; none overlap with iter 1's reducer-internal gaps (LG-0001..LG-0008). Direction-B (catalog claims behavior not in docs) was clean.
